thread.body:
**Subject: Cursor Master Renewal – Pricing Discussion**

Hi [Name],

Our Cursor Master subscription is coming up for renewal, and before we proceed, I wanted to have a quick conversation about pricing. As a early-stage startup, we're under real pressure to optimize every line of our budget, and we're seeing competitive alternatives in the market at meaningfully lower price points. The $500/mo rate is becoming difficult to justify without some adjustment.

I'd like to propose renewing at $400/mo — a 20% reduction — in exchange for committing to an annual contract upfront rather than continuing month-to-month. That's a guaranteed $4,800 paid in full, which I think is a fair trade for both sides. We value the product and want to stay, but I need the numbers to work.

Can you confirm whether this is something you're able to accommodate? Happy to jump on a quick call if that's easier. Looking forward to finding a path forward.

Best,
[Your Name]
[Company] | [Email] | [Phone]
